Unit Test cases: should create a user with all required fields
Description of test case: Verifies that a User document is created with firebaseUid email and name fields
description of result: User created successfully with all required fields stored correctly

Unit Test cases: should apply default role as student
Description of test case: Checks that the default role assigned to a new user is student
description of result: Default role correctly set to student when no role is specified

Unit Test cases: should reject an invalid role via enum validation
Description of test case: Ensures ValidationError is thrown when an invalid role like superadmin is provided
description of result: ValidationError thrown as expected for invalid role enum value

Unit Test cases: should fail when firebaseUid is missing
Description of test case: Validates that user creation fails without a firebaseUid field
description of result: ValidationError correctly raised for missing required field

Unit Test cases: should reject duplicate email
Description of test case: Tests unique constraint enforcement on the email field
description of result: Intermittent failure - duplicate key error not consistently thrown due to index creation timing
Risk Management: Mitigated by adding ensureIndexes() call in test setup to guarantee index build completion before running constraint tests; added retry logic for CI pipeline

Unit Test cases: should update updatedAt on save
Description of test case: Verifies the pre-save hook updates the updatedAt timestamp on modification
description of result: updatedAt timestamp correctly updated after modifying and saving the document

Unit Test cases: should create an exam with all required fields
Description of test case: Validates exam creation with title, teacherId, questions, scheduledAt, duration, and endTime
description of result: Exam document created with all fields correctly stored and referenced

Unit Test cases: should apply default settings
Description of test case: Checks default exam settings like shuffleQuestions, requireWebcam are applied
description of result: All default settings applied correctly including shuffleQuestions=false, requireWebcam=true

Unit Test cases: should validate question type enum
Description of test case: Ensures invalid question types are rejected by schema validation
description of result: ValidationError thrown for invalid_type question type

Unit Test cases: should calculate total points from questions
Description of test case: Tests the totalPoints virtual field calculation from question points
description of result: Virtual totalPoints correctly sums individual question points (10+20+30=60)

Unit Test cases: should fail without title
Description of test case: Validates that exam creation fails when title is not provided
description of result: ValidationError raised for missing required title field

Unit Test cases: should handle an exam with many questions
Description of test case: Tests exam creation and totalPoints calculation with 100 questions
description of result: Test timed out when creating exam with 100 MCQ questions due to validation overhead on each subdocument
Risk Management: Increased Jest timeout to 30s for bulk operation tests; added batch validation optimization to reduce per-question schema validation overhead; documented as known slow test

Unit Test cases: should create session with required fields
Description of test case: Verifies ProctoringSession creation with submissionId, studentId, and examId
description of result: Session created with all required ObjectId references stored correctly

Unit Test cases: should apply correct defaults
Description of test case: Checks default values for status, trustScore, faceDetectionEnabled, and summary fields
description of result: All defaults applied: status=active, trustScore=100, faceDetectionEnabled=true

Unit Test cases: should reject invalid session status
Description of test case: Ensures invalid session status values are rejected by schema validation
description of result: ValidationError thrown for status=invalid as expected

Unit Test cases: should calculate totalEvents from events array
Description of test case: Tests pre-save hook that calculates summary.totalEvents from events array length
description of result: Summary calculation returned stale count when events were modified after initial save without triggering pre-save hook
Risk Management: Implemented re-calculation on every save instead of only on new documents; added regression test for event modification after initial save; updated pre-save hook to always recalculate summary

Unit Test cases: should accept trustScore at minimum 0
Description of test case: Validates that trustScore boundary value of 0 is accepted
description of result: TrustScore of 0 stored correctly without validation error

Unit Test cases: should fail without submissionId
Description of test case: Validates that session creation fails without submissionId
description of result: ValidationError raised for missing required submissionId field

Unit Test cases: should create notification with required fields
Description of test case: Verifies Notification creation with userId, type, title, and message
description of result: Notification created with all fields correctly stored

Unit Test cases: should apply notification defaults
Description of test case: Checks default values for isRead and priority on notification creation
description of result: Defaults applied: isRead=false, priority=medium

Unit Test cases: should reject invalid notification type
Description of test case: Ensures invalid notification types are rejected by enum validation
description of result: ValidationError thrown for invalid_type notification type

Unit Test cases: should create report with required fields
Description of test case: Validates Report creation with type, title, generatedBy, startDate, and endDate
description of result: Date serialization issue caused startDate to shift by one day due to UTC timezone offset conversion
Risk Management: Fixed by explicitly setting timezone-aware ISO dates in test fixtures; added UTC normalization in Report schema pre-save hook; updated documentation on date handling conventions

Unit Test cases: should create LoginAttempt with required email
Description of test case: Tests LoginAttempt creation with email field and default success value
description of result: LoginAttempt created with email stored correctly, default success=false applied

description of result: Count query correctly returns 3 attempts within the time window

description of result: Generated secret matches hex pattern and has length 40

Unit Test cases: should generate a 6-digit TOTP code
Description of test case: Tests TOTP code generation produces a zero-padded 6-digit numeric string
description of result: Generated code matches 6-digit numeric pattern

Unit Test cases: should accept valid roles
Description of test case: Validates that all four valid roles (student, teacher, proctor, admin) pass validation
description of result: All valid roles returned unchanged by validateRole function

Unit Test cases: should calculate full score for all correct answers
Description of test case: Tests score calculation when all answers match correct answers
description of result: Full score of 30 correctly calculated from three correct answers (10+5+15)

Unit Test cases: should deduct 10 for high severity trust score penalty
Description of test case: Validates trust score penalty of 10 points for high severity events
description of result: Trust score correctly reduced from 100 to 90 for high severity

Unit Test cases: should be within grace period if within 5 minutes after end
Description of test case: Tests that submissions within 5 minutes after exam end are accepted
description of result: isWithinGracePeriod returns true for time 4 minutes after end time

Unit Test cases: should create a submission with required fields
Description of test case: Verifies Submission creation with examId and studentId

description of result: All defaults applied: score=0, status=in_progress, proctoringScore=100, isFlagged=false

Unit Test cases: should calculate percentage correctly on save
Description of test case: Tests pre-save hook percentage calculation from score and maxScore
description of result: Percentage calculated as NaN when maxScore was undefined instead of defaulting to 0
Risk Management: Added null/undefined check in pre-save hook to default maxScore to 0 before division; added schema-level validation to ensure maxScore is a valid number; created edge-case test suite for percentage calculation

Unit Test cases: should handle 100 percent score
Description of test case: Validates percentage calculation when score equals maxScore
description of result: Percentage correctly calculated as 100 when score=50, maxScore=50

Unit Test cases: should fail without examId
Description of test case: Validates that submission creation fails without examId
description of result: ValidationError raised for missing required examId field

Unit Test cases: should reject invalid proctoring event type
Description of test case: Ensures invalid proctoring event types are rejected by enum validation
description of result: ValidationError thrown for invalid_event proctoring event type

Unit Test cases: should handle full exam lifecycle
Description of test case: Tests complete flow: teacher creates exam then student submits then score is calculated
description of result: Full lifecycle completed: exam totalPoints=20, submission percentage=75%

Unit Test cases: should track trust score degradation through events
Description of test case: Tests proctoring session event tracking and summary calculation across models
description of result: Test failed due to MongoDB connection pool exhaustion when creating multiple related documents in rapid succession
Risk Management: Increased connection pool size from 5 to 10 in test config; implemented sequential document creation with explicit await to prevent connection stampede; added connection pool monitoring to CI logs

Unit Test cases: should track failed login attempts and lock account
Description of test case: Validates account locking workflow after 5 failed login attempts
description of result: Account correctly locked after 5 failures and properly reset after successful login

Unit Test cases: should create notifications for flagged submissions
Description of test case: Tests notification creation for both student and teacher on flagged submissions
description of result: Separate notifications created for student (exam_submitted) and teacher (flagged_submission)

Unit Test cases: should support multiple students submitting same exam
Description of test case: Tests that 5 students can submit the same exam with different scores and percentages
description of result: All 5 submissions created with correct percentages (0%, 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%)

Unit Test cases: should return 401 when no authorization header
Description of test case: Tests auth middleware returns 401 when request has no authorization header
description of result: Middleware returns 401 with "No token provided" message and next() is not called

Unit Test cases: should return 403 when token verification fails
Description of test case: Tests auth middleware returns 403 when Firebase token verification fails
description of result: Mock function not properly reset between test runs causing false positive on token rejection
Risk Management: Fixed by moving mockVerifyIdToken.mockReset() to beforeEach block; added explicit mock state verification before each assertion; documented mock lifecycle best practices for the team

Unit Test cases: should call next and set req.user on valid token
Description of test case: Validates successful token verification sets req.user and calls next()
description of result: req.user correctly populated with decoded token and next() called without error

Unit Test cases: should extract token correctly from Bearer format
Description of test case: Tests that token is correctly extracted from Bearer authorization header format
description of result: verifyIdToken called with exact token string after Bearer prefix extraction

description of result: apiLimiter exported and confirmed as typeof function
